title: Lamb Tagine Italian-Style
description: A traditional North African lamb tagine with Italian spices and herbs.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the Italian seasoning, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer to the oven. Cook at 300°F (150°C) for 2 hours.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the lamb hot, garnished with parsley.
